title: Wyper Keeps Fighting
description: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this scene centers on Luffy, Nola, Eneru, Enel, Nami. Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What is Luffy doing inside there again?

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: It seems we are under the surface...

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: How did you get out? A

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: never mind that. I'm fine, but...

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: How the heck did he get there!?

summary: Wyper keeps fighting for Shandia’s homeland even as Enel’s lightning and the collapsing battlefield push him past his limits.
